name: Menu
description: Combine a list of secondary actions into single interactive area

props.name: alignItemsLabels
props.description: Controls how indicator slot space is reserved on menu items for label alignment. 'all' reserves space on every Menu.Item, 'with-indicators' reserves space only on Menu.CheckboxItem and Menu.RadioItem, 'none' reserves space only on items that currently display an indicator.

props.name: arrowOffset
props.description: Arrow offset in px

props.name: arrowPosition
props.description: Arrow position

props.name: arrowRadius
props.description: Arrow border-radius in px

props.name: arrowSize
props.description: Arrow size in px

props.name: checkIcon
props.description: Custom icon rendered as the indicator of checked Menu.CheckboxItem and selected Menu.RadioItem. Can be overridden per item with the checkIcon prop.

props.name: children
props.description: Menu children

props.name: clickOutsideEvents
props.description: Events that trigger outside click detection. Includes mousedown for desktop clicks, touchstart for mobile, and keydown for Escape key handling

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Close delay in ms, applicable only to trigger="hover" variant

props.name: closeOnClickOutside
props.description: If set, the dropdown is closed on outside clicks

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: If set, the dropdown is closed when the Escape key is pressed

props.name: closeOnItemClick
props.description: If set, the Menu is closed when one of the items is clicked. Can be overridden per item with closeMenuOnClick prop

props.name: defaultOpened
props.description: Uncontrolled menu initial opened state

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, popover dropdown will not be rendered

props.name: floatingStrategy
props.description: Changes floating ui [position strategy](https://floating-ui.com/docs/usefloating#strategy)

props.name: hideDetached
props.description: If set, the dropdown is hidden when the element is hidden with styles or not visible on the screen

props.name: id
props.description: Id base to create accessibility connections

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, the dropdown is not unmounted from the DOM when hidden. display: none styles are added instead.

props.name: loop
props.description: If set, arrow key presses wrap around from last item to first and vice versa

props.name: menuItemTabIndex
props.description: Set the tabindex on all menu items. Use 0 to allow Tab key navigation through menu items (required for navigation menus following WAI-ARIA disclosure pattern).

props.name: middlewares
props.description: Floating ui middlewares to configure position handling
props.defaultValue: { flip: true, shift: true, inline: false }

props.name: offset
props.description: Offset of the dropdown element

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when menu opened state changes

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when Menu is closed

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Called when the popover is dismissed by clicking outside or by pressing escape

props.name: onEnterTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when enter transition ends

props.name: onExitTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when exit transition ends

props.name: onOpen
props.description: Called when Menu is opened

props.name: onPositionChange
props.description: Called when dropdown position changes

props.name: openDelay
props.description: Open delay in ms, applicable only to trigger="hover" variant

props.name: opened
props.description: Controlled menu opened state

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Props passed down to Overlay component

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props to pass down to the Portal when withinPortal is true

props.name: position
props.description: Dropdown position relative to the target element

props.name: preventPositionChangeWhenVisible
props.description: If true, the dropdown picks its side on open (flip runs once, preferring the position prop) and then never changes side — scrolling, resizing, and content size changes will not flip the dropdown. The side is recalculated fresh on the next open. Does not affect the shift middleware. Set to false to keep flip active and allow the dropdown to re-flip on every change.

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: Determines whether focus should be automatically returned to control when dropdown closes

props.name: shadow
props.description: Key of theme.shadows or any other valid CSS box-shadow value

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Transition component. Use to configure duration and animation type.

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: If set, focus is trapped within the menu dropdown when it is opened

props.name: trigger
props.description: Event trigger to open menu. Note: 'hover' is not keyboard accessible; prefer 'click-hover' for accessible hover menus

props.name: width
props.description: Dropdown width, or 'target' to make dropdown width the same as target element

props.name: withArrow
props.description: Determines whether component should have an arrow

props.name: withInitialFocusPlaceholder
props.description: Adds a hidden focusable element at the start of the dropdown to prevent unexpected focus jumps when opening with keyboard. Set to false if you need custom focus management.

props.name: withOverlay
props.description: Determines whether the overlay should be displayed when the dropdown is opened

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: Determines whether dropdown should be rendered within the Portal

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Dropdown z-index

props.name: children
props.description: Target element

props.name: refProp
props.description: Key of the prop used to get element ref, useful for forwarding refs to custom components

props.name: children
props.description: Item label

props.name: closeMenuOnClick
props.description: Controls whether the menu closes when this item is clicked. When undefined, inherits from Menu's closeOnItemClick prop. When true or false, overrides the Menu-level setting

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute, applies disabled styles

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Section displayed at the start of the label

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Section displayed at the end of the label

props.name: clearSearchOnClose
props.description: If set, clears the search value after the menu close transition completes. Requires a controlled value/onChange pair.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute on the input element

props.name: error
props.description: Determines whether the input should have error styles and aria-invalid attribute

props.name: id
props.description: Input element id

props.name: inputSize
props.description: HTML size attribute for the input element (number of visible characters)

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the left side of the input

props.name: leftSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the leftSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: leftSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the leftSection element

props.name: leftSectionWidth
props.description: Left section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-left, by default equals to the input height

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays loading indicator in the left or right section

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Position of the loading indicator

props.name: multiline
props.description: Adjusts padding and sizing calculations for multiline inputs (use with component="textarea"). Does not make the input multiline by itself.

props.name: pointer
props.description: Determines whether the input should have cursor: pointer style. Use when input acts as a button-like trigger (e.g., component="button" for Select/DatePicker).

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: required
props.description: Sets required attribute on the input element

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the right side of the input

props.name: rightSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the rightSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: rightSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the rightSection element

props.name: rightSectionWidth
props.description: Right section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-right, by default equals to the input height

props.name: rootRef
props.description: Root element ref

props.name: size
props.description: Controls input height, horizontal padding, and font-size

props.name: withAria
props.description: Determines whether aria- and other accessibility attributes should be added to the input. Only disable when implementing custom accessibility handling.

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: Determines whether the input should have red border and red text color when the error prop is set

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element of the Input component

props.name: checkIcon
props.description: Replaces the default check icon rendered in the indicator slot when the item is checked. Overrides checkIcon set on Menu.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state. Overrides selection derived from the parent Menu.CheckboxGroup.

props.name: children
props.description: Item label

props.name: closeMenuOnClick
props.description: If set, closes the menu when this item is clicked. By default, checkbox items do not close the menu.

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Uncontrolled default checked state. Ignored when the item is used inside Menu.CheckboxGroup.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute, applies disabled styles

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when checked state changes. Overrides onChange of the parent Menu.CheckboxGroup.

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Section displayed at the end of the label

props.name: value
props.description: Value of the checkbox item. When used inside Menu.CheckboxGroup, determines whether the item is checked and what value is added/removed on toggle.

props.name: children
props.description: Menu.CheckboxItem components and other elements

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled default selected values

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new array of selected values when a Menu.CheckboxItem is toggled

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected values

props.name: checkIcon
props.description: Replaces the default radio indicator rendered when the item is selected. Overrides checkIcon set on Menu.

props.name: checked
props.description: Overrides selected state determined by the parent Menu.RadioGroup.

props.name: children
props.description: Item label

props.name: closeMenuOnClick
props.description: If set, closes the menu when this item is clicked. By default, radio items do not close the menu.

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute, applies disabled styles

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the item value when item is selected. Overrides onChange of the parent Menu.RadioGroup.

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Section displayed at the end of the label

props.name: value
props.description: Value of the radio item. Used by the parent Menu.RadioGroup to determine which item is selected.

props.name: children
props.description: Menu.RadioItem components and other elements

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled default selected value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new value when a Menu.RadioItem is selected

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected value

props.name: children
props.description: Element that opens the menu when right-clicked. Menu dropdown is positioned at the cursor. The trigger element must not call event.preventDefault() in its own onContextMenu handler, otherwise the native context menu is not suppressed.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, the right-click trigger is disabled and the browser's default context menu is shown

props.name: longPressDelay
props.description: Delay in ms before a touch long-press opens the dropdown on touch devices, 500 by default

props.name: arrowOffset
props.description: Arrow offset in px

props.name: arrowPosition
props.description: Arrow position

props.name: arrowRadius
props.description: Arrow border-radius in px

props.name: arrowSize
props.description: Arrow size in px

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Close delay in ms, applicable when hover trigger is used

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, popover dropdown will not be rendered

props.name: floatingStrategy
props.description: Changes floating ui [position strategy](https://floating-ui.com/docs/usefloating#strategy)

props.name: hideDetached
props.description: If set, the dropdown is hidden when the element is hidden with styles or not visible on the screen

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, the dropdown is not unmounted from the DOM when hidden. display: none styles are added instead.

props.name: middlewares
props.description: Floating ui middlewares to configure position handling
props.defaultValue: { flip: true, shift: true, inline: false }

props.name: offset
props.description: Offset of the dropdown element

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with current state when dropdown opens or closes

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when dropdown closes

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Called when the popover is dismissed by clicking outside or by pressing escape

props.name: onEnterTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when enter transition ends

props.name: onExitTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when exit transition ends

props.name: onOpen
props.description: Called when dropdown opens

props.name: onPositionChange
props.description: Called when dropdown position changes

props.name: openDelay
props.description: Open delay in ms, applicable when hover trigger is used

props.name: opened
props.description: Controlled opened state

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Props passed down to Overlay component

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props to pass down to the Portal when withinPortal is true

props.name: position
props.description: Dropdown position relative to the target element

props.name: preventPositionChangeWhenVisible
props.description: If true, the dropdown picks its side on open (flip runs once, preferring the position prop) and then never changes side — scrolling, resizing, and content size changes will not flip the dropdown. The side is recalculated fresh on the next open. Does not affect the shift middleware. Set to false to keep flip active and allow the dropdown to re-flip on every change.

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: Determines whether focus should be automatically returned to control when dropdown closes

props.name: safeAreaPolygon
props.description: Determines whether submenu stays open while the cursor moves toward its dropdown. Pass an object to configure safe polygon behavior.

props.name: shadow
props.description: Key of theme.shadows or any other valid CSS box-shadow value

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Transition component that used to animate dropdown presence, use to configure duration and animation type

props.name: width
props.description: Dropdown width, or 'target' to make dropdown width the same as target element

props.name: withArrow
props.description: Determines whether component should have an arrow

props.name: withOverlay
props.description: Determines whether the overlay should be displayed when the dropdown is opened

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: Determines whether dropdown should be rendered within the Portal

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Dropdown z-index

props.name: children
props.description: Item label

props.name: closeMenuOnClick
props.description: If set, the menu is closed when the item is clicked. Overrides closeOnItemClick prop on the Menu component.

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute, applies disabled styles

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Section displayed at the start of the label

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Section displayed at the end of the label

props.name: children
props.description: Target element

props.name: refProp
props.description: Key of the prop used to get element ref
